description: Pre-computed WSD4FEDSRM worker profiles (Path G calibration)
source: Zenodo 8415066 (Borg endurance times, 34 subjects, dynamic IR at 35/45/55% MVIC)
calibration_method: 1D grid search on F (R fixed at 0.02, r=15)
non_shoulder_source: Frey-Law 2012 Table 1 POPULATION_FR (v2 corrected), correlated sampling rho=0.5

ankle.source: population (Frey-Law & Avin 2010), F correlated with shoulder (rho=0.5)

knee.source: population (Frey-Law & Avin 2010), F correlated with shoulder (rho=0.5)
